failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of TBAB/EG at 120°C combined with potential product precipitation in the 16m capillary
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement a high-pressure flush cycle with pure EG between runs

failure_modes.cause: Poor mixing regime (Da_mass=14.39) and low Re (87) leading to radial temperature gradients
failure_modes.mitigation: Integrate static mixers or utilize a coiled-tube reactor to induce Dean vortices

failure_modes.cause: PFA tubing operating at 120°C under constant pressure may soften, altering internal diameter and tau
failure_modes.mitigation: Use PFA tubing with an external stainless steel sleeve or braided reinforcement

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage leads to rapid pressure spike in 16m capillary
Pump seal — failure leads to loss of pressure and flashing of solvent at 120°C
validation_experiments: Long-term stability run (5x tau) to monitor pressure drift for signs of DES-induced fouling
Temperature mapping across the reactor length using an internal thermocouple to validate heat transfer
Solubility stress test: concentrate reaction mixture to 1.0 M at 120°C to check for precipitation thresholds
